_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Shape, mold, and improve the EA work role.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-003 (DA, cosine: 0.466), LS-S-002 (LS, cosine: 0.454).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.510). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [ea, improve, mold, role, shape, work] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.886, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Shape, mold, and improve the EA work role." and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.472 ≈ STS 0.510 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.2%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [ea, improve, mold, role, shape, work]. WIDAI terms: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].
